body.name: @shortcut/mcp
body.readme: :warning: :warning: :warning: All future development on the Shortcut MCP server will be done on the remote server at https://mcp.shortcut.com/mcp. This repo remains here for historical reference purposes only. :warning: :warning: :warning: ---- # @shortcut/mcp [![X](https://img.shields.io/twitter/follow/shortcut.svg?label=Follow%20@shortcut)](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=shortcut) MCP Server for [Shortcut](https://shortcut.com) users. ## Usage Usage instructions can be found at https://mcp.shortcut.com/mcp ## Issues and Troubleshooting Ask for help in our [Community Slack](https://shortcut.com/join-slack)
